name_en: 💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Long Wallet, Leather Wallet, featuring the brand's iconic double-G hardware, made from calfskin, embossed with a boar grain texture for a unique tactile feel. Black nubuck leather double-G, 12 card slots, 4 bill slots, ID window.
name_cn:
💖《With full original green box packaging》💖 GG Marmont Series Long Wallet, Leather Wallet, featuring the brand's iconic double-G hardware, made from calfskin, embossed with a boar grain texture for a unique tactile feel. Black nubuck leather double-G, 12 card slots, 4 bill slots, ID window.
Model: 436023.
Open dimensions: 18.2(W) x 17.5cm(H)
Closed dimensions: 9(W) x 17.5cm(H) x 2cm(D)
Color: Black/Full Leather.
Brass metal hardware
Made in Italy
